overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a dark coat and hat walking through a historic city at night. The scene features wet cobblestone streets reflecting gas lamp light, flowering trees, and ornate 19th-century architecture with covered walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city plaza with clock tower and iron fence

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone street toward the illuminated historic building

entered.detail: tall street clock on a black metal pole with illuminated face
black wrought iron fence running along the sidewalk
wooden slatted bench against the fence
trees with pink blossoms lining the street
large multi-story building with lit windows and ornate facade

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open historic plaza at night, passing a prominent clock tower and iron fence. The wet cobblestones reflect the warm glow of street lamps, with flowering trees and a grand illuminated building visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian arcade with benches and planters

events.description: character steps under the covered porch of the historic building, entering the sheltered walkway
character passes by NPCs standing and sitting along the building wall

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered porch past NPCs and ornate benches

notable_agents.action: man in suspenders leaning against the building wall
man sitting on a bench smoking a cigarette

entered.detail: wooden ceilinged walkway with support columns providing shelter
stone columns supporting the building's upper balcony
warm glowing lanterns suspended from the porch ceiling
ornate white metal bench with scrollwork design

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered porch area with stone columns and hanging lanterns. Two NPCs are visible—one standing against the wall and another sitting on an ornate bench. The walkway features decorative planters and wrought iron furniture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk transitioning past corner building with tram tracks

events.description: passing the corner of the building where the covered walkway opens slightly to reveal the street and tram car

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, passing benches and decorative elements

entered.detail: rounded corner building with green window shutters
dark colored tram or trolley car parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The character continues under the covered arcade, passing the corner of the building where the view opens to show a tram car on the street. The walkway features more wrought iron benches and decorative planters against the building facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered arcade approaching commercial building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking toward the building entrance with 'SYBILS' signage visible ahead

entered.detail: building facade with 'SYBILS' lettering visible above the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the covered walkway, heading toward a building entrance marked with 'SYBILS' signage. The arcade becomes more enclosed with the building facade dominating the view ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, lamp-lit historic plaza into the sheltered confines of a grand building's arcade. It begins by trailing the character across wet cobblestones that reflect the warm glow of street lamps, passing a prominent clock tower and iron fence toward an illuminated building. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the open square into a covered porch area characterized by stone columns, hanging lanterns, and NPCs resting on ornate benches. The camera then continues along the arcade, passing decorative planters and wrought iron furniture before the view momentarily opens to reveal a tram car on the street. Finally, the walkway becomes more enclosed as the camera follows the character toward a building entrance marked with Sybils signage.
